title: Why You Can't Remember Being a Baby

segments.text: You spent years as a baby, but can't recall a single moment.
And scientists actually have a name for it.
Your brain's memory system is still wiring itself in those first years.
You were learning constantly, but not yet storing lasting memories.
So your earliest years were real, your brain just never saved them.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Infantile amnesia: your memory system isn't built yet to store those first years. Follow for daily science & tech! 🧠
